message:
fix(build): Add libstdc++ and libgcc_s linking for Linux edgeboxc

Fixes linking errors on Linux CI for C++ symbols and compiler-rt intrinsics.
The WAMR AOT compiler requires full C++ runtime support.

Added:
- libstdc++ for C++ standard library symbols
- libgcc_s for compiler intrinsics (__addvdi3, __mulvdi3)
